_doc: Didit V3 webhook 'Kyc Expired' fixture. Maps to internal status='kyc_expired' (Batch B 2026-05-07). Terminal state: invokes revokeActiveCredentials (Chain burn + DB flip + credential.revoked firm fan-out via Cat 14 pipeline), resets customers.kyc_level to kyc_0, writes customer.kyc_expired audit, dispatches kyc.session.kyc_expired firm webhook event + customer email pointing back to /kyc.
